raw_consumer_statement: Frontier charged my Frontier Mastercard {$590.00} on XX/XX/2024. I disputed the charge with Mastercard, having no idea what it was for. Mastercard temporarily credited the {$590.00} but was unable to tell me what the charge was for. Mastercard subsequently placed the charge back on my credit card and closed my dispute, allegedly because I failed to return two ( 2 ) phone calls. ( I have no record of any voicemail messages from Mastercard. ). Mastercard referred me to Frontier for resolution. Frontier now refuses to remove the {$590.00} charge for a XXXX Pass that I did not authorize and do not have on my account because I filed a dispute with Mastercard. I informed Frontier that the dispute is closed ; I never authorized this charge ; and I do not have access to this XXXX pass. Frontier advised today that they also consider the matter closed. I have been charged {$590.00} for something I do not want - never authorized - and do not have. Sounds like an illegal scheme between Frontier and Frontier Mastercard to cheat people out of {$590.00} plus interest.
